message:
feat: add GA4 tracking to mission landing page (#4589)

Emit ksc_mission_error event when a deep link fails to load (slug not
found or no slug specified) and emit page_view for successful loads.
This surfaces broken mission links in GA4 analytics so they don't go
undetected like the MSW passthrough bug (PR #4587).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
